entry.title: likunix'blog
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

真不会？

Quick Start

Create a new post

$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing

Run server

$ hexo server

More info: Server

Generate static files

$ hexo generate

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

$ hexo deploy

More info: Deployment

entry.title: 我的第一篇博客
entry.content:
*第一

这是加黑显示吗
这是两个尖括号
这是一个尖括号
*第二
不知道要说什么

*第三
书签目录出来没

*第四

*井号

entry.title: 迷宫求解
entry.content:
· ···
#include
#include
#include
using namespace std;
stack st1;
stack st2;
int a[5][5];
int x, y;
//判断是否为出口
bool stop()
{
//（3，3）是出口
if (st1.top() == 3 && st2.top() == 3)
{
cout << “迷宫求解成功，路径为：” << endl;
return 1;
}
else
return 0;
}
//判断当前位置是否可通
bool decide(int x,int y)
{
int sum= a[x][y] + a[x + 1][y] + a[x - 1][y] + a[x][y + 1] + a[x][y - 1];
//(x==1&&y==1)指迷宫入口下表
if ((x==1&&y==1)||sum < 2 || sum == 2)
return 1;
else
return 0;
}

//将栈内容逆序打印
void printroute()
{
if (st1.empty())
{
cout << “找不到路径！”;
return;
}
stack st3;
stack st4;
while(!st1.empty() && !st2.empty())
{
st3.push(st1.top());
st4.push(st2.top());
st1.pop();
st2.pop();
}
int count=0;
while (!st3.empty() && !st4.empty())
{
if (count == 10)
cout << endl;
cout << “(“ << st3.top()+1 << “,” << st4.top()+1 << “)” << “ “;
st3.pop();
st4.pop();
count++;
}
}
int main()
{
for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++)
for (int j = 0; j < 5; j++)
a[i][j] = 1;
for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++)
{
for (int j = 0; j < 5; j++)
{
if (j == 2 && i > 0 && i < 4)
a[i][j] = 0;
}
}
a[1][1] = 0;
a[3][3] = 0;
//迷宫
cout << “迷宫：” << endl;
for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++)
{
for (int j = 0; j < 5; j++)
{
cout<< a[i][j]<<” “;
}
cout << endl;
}
//迷宫求解
x = 1; y = 1;
st1.push(x);
st2.push(y);
while (!st1.empty())
{
if(stop())
break;
//5是迷宫宽度&&(x>y||x==y)
if (!decide(x, y))
{
a[x][y] = 1;
st1.pop();
st2.pop();
}
else if (decide(x, y) && x + 1 < 5 && a[x + 1][y] == 0)
{
x = x + 1;
st1.push(x);
st2.push(y);
}
else if (decide(x, y) && y + 1 < 5 && a[x][y + 1] == 0)
{
a[x + 1][y] = 1;
y = y + 1;
st1.push(x);
st2.push(y);
}
else if (decide(x, y) && x - 1 > -1 && a[x - 1][y] == 0)
{
a[x][y + 1] = 1;
x = x - 1;
st1.push(x);
st2.push(y);
}
else if (decide(x, y) && y - 1 > -1 && a[x][y-1] == 0)
{
a[x-1][y] = 1;
y = y - 1;
st1.push(x);
st2.push(y);
}

}//输出路径printroute();

}
· ···
